content: tools.planning_tools.rank_scenarios(scenarios_json='[{"scenario_type": "airfreight", "scenario_name": "Emergency Airfreight", "financials": {"incremental_cost_usd": 239000}, "timing": {"implementation_days": 2}, "service_level_protection": "High"}, {"scenario_type": "buffer_build", "scenario_name": "Pre-emptive Buffer Stock Build", "financials": {"incremental_cost_usd": 10600}, "timing": {"implementation_days": 1}, "service_level_protection": "High"}, {"scenario_type": "alternate_supplier", "scenario_name": "Alternate Supplier Activation", "financials": {"incremental_cost_usd": 57600}, "timing": {"implementation_days": 21}, "service_level_protection": "Medium"}]', risk_appetite='low')

tools.action_tools.submit_mitigation_for_approval(title='CRITICAL Mitigation: Buffer Build for SEMI-MCU-32', recommendation="APPROVE — Initiate 'Pre-emptive Buffer Stock Build' to secure 60-day stock of SEMI-MCU-32. ERP will be adjusted to pull forward current POs.", situation='Asia-Europe (Suez) disruption causing potential 14-day production halt. Inventory runway for critical part SEMI-MCU-32 is 12 days. Total financial risk $1.28M.', severity='CRITICAL', context_summary='Asia-Europe (Suez) shipping is disrupted with 14+ day delays. SUP-001 (semiconductors) has 12 days inventory, critical to production of ECU modules. Risk of 100% SLA breach for BMW/VW ($1.28M exposure). Pre-emptive buffer build suggested as highest-ranked mitigation.', scenario_name='Pre-emptive Buffer Stock Build', incremental_cost_usd=10600)

tools.action_tools.send_slack_alert(channel='#supply-chain-alerts', severity='CRITICAL', disruption_summary='Asia-Europe (Suez) lane disrupted; critical semiconductor part (SEMI-MCU-32) from SUP-001 at risk of stockout within 12 days. Exposure: $1.28M.', recommended_action='Execute Pre-emptive Buffer Build; awaiting executive approval.', financial_exposure_usd=1278000, requires_approval=True)

tools.action_tools.draft_supplier_email(supplier_name='SemiTech Asia', supplier_contact='sales@semitech-asia.tw', disruption_context='Asia-Europe (Suez) maritime lane disruption impacting standard lead times.', ask='Requesting urgent expediting of open POs (PO-1001, PO-1003) and confirmation of supply chain contingency plans due to Suez shipping lane disruptions.', sender_name='Supply Chain Operations Team', company_name='AutomotiveParts GmbH')

tools.action_tools.flag_erp_reorder_adjustment(item_id='SEMI-MCU-32', adjustment_type='increase_buffer', new_quantity=60, reason='Pre-emptive buffer build to mitigate Suez lane disruption.', auto_execute=False)

tools.memory_tools.log_disruption_event(event_type='Shipping Disruption', region='Asia-Europe (Suez)', severity='CRITICAL', affected_suppliers=['SUP-001'], description='Asia-Europe (Suez) lane disruption causing 14-day expected delays; impacting SUP-001 semiconductor supply.', mitigation_action='Initiated pre-emptive buffer build plan pending approval; supplier contact drafted.', estimated_cost_usd=10600, outcome='Pending')

tools.action_tools.generate_executive_summary(disruption_event_json='{"description": "Asia-Europe (Suez) lane disruption causing 14-day expected delays; impacting SUP-001 semiconductor supply.", "severity": "CRITICAL", "affected_regions": ["Asia-Europe (Suez)"], "suppliers": ["SUP-001"]}', risk_assessment_json='{"total_financial_exposure_usd": 1278000, "total_revenue_at_risk_usd": 768000, "sla_penalties_at_risk_usd": 510000, "disruption_duration_days": 14, "affected_production_lines": ["PL-1"]}', recommended_scenario_json='{"scenario_name": "Pre-emptive Buffer Stock Build", "description": "Increase safety stock target to 60 days for SEMI-MCU-32 by pulling forward orders.", "financials": {"incremental_cost_usd": 10600}, "service_level_protection": "High", "timing": {"implementation_days": 1}}', actions_taken_json='[{"description": "Sent critical Slack alert to #supply-chain-alerts."}, {"description": "Drafted urgent supplier outreach email to SemiTech Asia (SUP-001)."}, {"description": "Submitted \'Pre-emptive Buffer Stock Build\' mitigation for executive approval."}, {"description": "Flagged ERP system for 60-day buffer increase for SEMI-MCU-32."}]')
